title: Native-style dialogue: apartment visit
subtitle: Ask practical housing questions.
overview: Housing conversations require detail and politeness.
Ask about costs, noise, transport, contract.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Is there a lot of noise?
How long does the contract last?

items.en: I am quite interested in the apartment.

items.es: ¿Los gastos están incluidos en el alquiler?
items.en: Are utilities included in the rent?
Is there a lot of noise at night?
How long does the contract last?

items.es: Me gustaría pensarlo y responder mañana.
items.en: I would like to think about it and answer tomorrow.
